zh.lifeSummary: 當John Trevelyan於大約1425年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 維普時，他的父親Thomas Trevelyan33歲，母親Lucy Trevelyan28歲。他於大約1450年與Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 維普結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年在英國英格蘭戴文亞爾可姆享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Trevelyan于大约1425年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 維普时，他的父亲Thomas Trevelyan33岁，母亲Lucy Trevelyan28岁。他于大约1450年与Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 維普结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年在英国英格兰戴文亞爾可姆享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trevelyan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Trevelyan in Saint Veep (Cornwall).

variants.name: Trevillian
meanings: Cornish: variant of Trevelyan, a habitational name from Trevelyan in Saint Veep (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre(f) ‘estate, farmstead’ + either an unrecorded Old Cornish personal name equivalent either to Old Breton Ilian or the recorded Old Cornish Milian, with mutation of m to v. This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. Compare Trovillion .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Trevelyan was born about 1425, in St Veep, Cornwall, England, his father, Thomas Trevelyan, was 33 and his mother, Lucy Trevelyan, was 28. He married Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough about 1450, in St Veep, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1494, in Yarcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Trevelyan est né environ 1425, à St Veep, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Trevelyan, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lucy Trevelyan, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough environ 1450, à St Veep, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1494, à Yarcombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Trevelyan um 1425 in St Veep, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Trevelyan 33 und seine Mutter Lucy Trevelyan 28. Er hat um 1450 in St Veep, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1494 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Yarcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Trevelyan è nato il circa 1425 nel St Veep, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Thomas Trevelyan, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Trevelyan, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough circa 1450, nel St Veep, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1494, nel Yarcombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Trevelyanが約1425年にイギリスコルンワルスト ベエップで生まれた時，父Thomas Trevelyanは33歳，母Lucy Trevelyanは28歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ベエップでElizabeth Isabel Whalesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年にイギリスイギリスデボンヤーコンベで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Trevelyan(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 코른월 스트 브이프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Trevelyan(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Trevelyan(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 브이프에서 Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 야르코브에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Trevelyan nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em St Veep, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Trevelyan, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Trevelyan, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough aproximadamente 1450, em St Veep, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1494, em Yarcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Trevelyan родился около 1425 г. в местности ст вип, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Trevelyan было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy Trevelyan, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough около 1450 г. в местности ст вип, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности яркомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

Se casó con Elizabeth Isabel Whalesborough aproximadamente 1450, en St Veep, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
